  "findings": [
    "Unsupported runs of NM/MC cable violating standard securing and supporting intervals."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Secure NM cable within 12 inches of every outlet box, junction box, cabinet, or fitting.",
    "Support NM cable at intervals not exceeding 4.5 feet.",
    "Secure MC cable within 12 inches of every box, cabinet, fitting, or termination.",
    "Support MC cable at intervals not exceeding 6 feet."
  ],
  "rationale": "The NM/MC cable runs are unsupported, which violates the prescriptive securing and supporting requirements of the National Electrical Code. Unsupported cables are subject to physical damage, strain on terminations, and potential contact with sharp edges or piping.",

    "NEC 300.4",
    "NEC 334.30",
    "NEC 330.30"
  ]
}
